message:
franken_numpy-7o9k expose numpy.exceptions submodule + top-level forwards

Mirror numpy.exceptions on fnp_python.exceptions: eager re-export from
numpy.exceptions when importable, PEP-562 lazy fallback for embedded
interpreters that finish module init before numpy lands on sys.path,
and an explicit 6-name fallback __all__ (RankWarning was dropped from
numpy.exceptions in 2.x; it now lives only on numpy.polynomial). Also
re-export each exception class on the top-level fnp_python module so
'from fnp_python import AxisError' matches 'from numpy import AxisError'.

Add exceptions_submodule_matches_numpy parity test:
- __all__ is non-empty and includes every canonical name.
- When numpy is importable, our __all__ equals numpy.exceptions's
  verbatim (order included).
- Each name in __all__ is the SAME object as numpy.exceptions.<name>
  so isinstance(err, fnp_python.AxisError) catches what numpy raises.
- Top-level forwards (fnp_python.<Name>) are also identity.
- PEP-562 lazy-fallback verification: build a fresh module, drop each
  eager attr, re-getattr, confirm it still resolves to numpy's class.

rch lib suite: 474/474 pass. UBS exit 0.
